productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Varex Black Sports Shoes
description: When you're a busy man on the go, you want a pair of shoes that can transition as quickly as you can. The puma Cell Varex SL has everything you'll need to train and looks good when teamed with casual wear.UpperSynthetic leather uppers with mesh under the laces for superior durability and comfort Padded tongue and collar for extremely snug FitCentral lacing to customise fitOutsole embedded onto the toe box for better shock absorptionMidsoleMolded EVA sock-liner offers superior cushioning and supportEVA and TPR heel unit offers the ultimate cushioningEVA in the forefoot provides you with added cushion during trainingOutsoleEverTrack rubber composite outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasArchTech technology in the design of this pair offers you the necessary support required to sprintshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
